---
title: "Archive"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
:root {
  --accent: #D4537E;
  --muted: #8a8a8a;
  --border: #e4e4e4;
  --text: #1a1a1a;
}

#title-block-header { display: none !important; }

.archive-wrap {
  max-width: 860px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3rem 1.5rem 5rem;
}

.archive-heading {
  font-size: 1.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text);
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
}

.archive-desc {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin: 0 0 2.5rem;
}

.archive-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

.archive-table th {
  font-size: 10px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-weight: 600;
  text-align: left;
  padding: 0.6rem 1rem 0.6rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.archive-table td {
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem 0.75rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  color: var(--text);
  font-size: 0.875rem;
}

.archive-table .archive-tags {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}
</style>

<div class="archive-wrap">
  <h1 class="archive-heading">Archive</h1>
  <p class="archive-desc">A running log of what I've worked on.</p>

  <table class="archive-table">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th>Date</th>
        <th>Project</th>
        <th>Tags</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td>Early 2026</td>
        <td>Rent the Runway ML</td>
        <td class="archive-tags">NLP, scikit-learn</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Late 2025</td>
        <td>Customer Targeting & Profit Optimization ML</td>
        <td class="archive-tags">ML, scikit-learn, NLP, Analytics</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Mid 2025</td>
        <td>Snowflake GenAI & Wage Optimization Pipeline</td>
        <td class="archive-tags">GenAI, Snowflake, Python, SQL</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Mid 2025</td>
        <td>Amazon Demand & Inventory Analytics Dashboard</td>
        <td class="archive-tags">Tableau, BI, Data Viz, SQL</td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
